title: Survey 001: Mapping the Saraswati and Kanh
excerpt: First systematic field survey of both rivers. We walked the full stretch, noted blockage points, and collected samples for the first unified map of the system.

title: Building Pravāh's Ground Network: Who We Need
excerpt: A clear look at the people we need on the ground, from field researchers and engineers to outreach volunteers and policy support.

title: Why Pravāh: The Case for Science-Driven River Restoration
excerpt: The idea behind Pravāh, why the work starts with data and field action, and how the two wings fit together.
